name: Monero

supply.supply_cap: No hard cap; unlimited via tail emission
supply.notes: Main emission curve completed May 2022; now in perpetual tail emission phase

unlocks.notes: No team allocation, no investor unlocks, no foundation reserve. Fair launch in April 2014 with no premine or instamine.

mechanism.fee_capture: Miners capture transaction fees + block reward
mechanism.value_accrual_summary: Native L1 privacy currency; no token-level fee capture beyond miner block reward. Mining incentives perpetually sustained via tail emission to ensure network security even when fees alone insufficient.

inflation.trend: Declining over time as supply grows (same emission fixed at 0.6 XMR/block forever)
inflation.notes: Would take ~100+ years of tail emission to double supply; inflation approaching zero asymptotically

privacy_features.ring_signatures: Obfuscate sender identity by grouping with decoy outputs
privacy_features.bulletproofs: Zero-knowledge proof method for transaction validity

data_collection_notes: Monero tail emission (0.6 XMR/block) entered perpetual phase in June 2022, replacing main emission curve. Current supply ~18.45M XMR growing at ~0.85%/year. Fair-launch cryptocurrency with no premine, founder allocation, or governance token. Pure PoW mining via RandomX algorithm. Holder concentration analysis is UNAVAILABLE on-chain (privacy by design—rings and stealth addresses prevent tracking). Upcoming: THORChain native XMR swap integration (May-June 2026), FCMP++ privacy upgrade (beta 2026). Sources: CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap, LocalMonero, Gate.com, Gemini.
